ab: umungi’ kuwing maras cu ruwas la.
en: I forgot to bring the textbook.

ab: magalgay kuwing mitaal ki isu’.
en: I will share it with you.

ab: umungi’ kuwing maras cu papawng cu pinatas la.
en: I forgot to bring the eraser.

ab: kabaxanay mu isu’.
en: I can lend you.

ab: umungi’ su’ maras cu papatas la qu?
en: Do you forget to bring your pen?

ab: uwal, kabaxay mu ku papatas su’ qu?
en: Yes, can you lend me a pen?

ab: nanuwan ku naniqun su’ i kumuriax?
en: What would you like for lunch?

ab: paqaneq kuwing cu miyenpaw.
en: I want some bread.

ab: nanuwan ku naniqun su’ i kumugabiyan?
en: What would you like for dinner?

ab: paqaneq kuwing cu mami’.
en: I want some rice.

ab: nanuwan ku niqun su’ cu kumunama’?
en: What did you have for breakfast?

ab: minaneq kuwing cu batu’.
en: I ate an egg.

ab: nanuwan ku niqun su’ cu kumuriax?
en: What did you have for lunch?

ab: minaneq kuwing cu hyi’ na waylung.
en: I ate the chicken.

ab: halay ta’ i kumcacri’ cu mari’.
en: Let’s play soccer.

ab: usausa’ isu’ han, usalay mi su’ kumiyum i kisa’.
ch: B:你先去，我等一下去找你。
en: You go first and I will catch up later.

ab: halay ta’ i lumanguy.
en: Let’s go swimming.

ab: uwal! magalgay ta’ i musa’.
en: Sure! Let’s go there together.

ab: halay ta’ i magunawu’ cu mari’.
en: Let’s play ball.

ab: laxi, halay ta’ i humakut cu ruwas han.
en: No, we have to carry books first.

ab: quminuwax su’ cu gi’nux la qu?
en: Did you brush your teeth?

ab: iqaat na’, kiya kuwing qumuwax cu salaman.
en: Not yet. I am doing the dishes.

ab: quminuwax su’ cu ngaquwaq la qu?
en: Did you rinse out your mouth?

ab: quminuwax kuwing cu ngaquwaq la.
en: Yes, I rinsed out my mouth.

ab: quminuwax su’ cu salaman la qu?
en: Did you wash the dishes?

ab: naqarun mu qumuwax ku salaman la.
en: I already washed the dishes.

ab: micuwa’ su’ ka ini’ payma’ cu qaba’?
en: Why didn’t you wash your hands?

ab: mimaay kuwing kisa’.
en: I will wash my hands later.

ab: nanuwan ku waw su’ sawni’?
en: What were you doing just now?

ab: minusa’ kuwing kumiyum i papsibaq.
en: I went to meet the teacher.

ab: nanuwan ku pakawaw su’ i malax matas?
en: What are you going to do after school?

ab: papasauhi kuwing i imu.
en: I will go home directly.

ab: nanuwan ku pakawaw niya’ i malax matas?
en: What is she doing after school?

ab: mausa’ hiya’ i yugi’.
en: She is going to go dancing.
